name: Dynamic Shield
effect: When you Boost gain 3 Overshield. This cannot raise your Overshield above your mech's Speed.
description: Speed, precision, and decisiveness - these are the core tenants CC mech design. With this system the Iron Tiger can attain a flowing balance of offense and defense.

name: Predator Actuator
effect:
You can lock on as a free action against targets who are Prone, Immobilized, Impaired, Jammed or Stunned. 
 Movement from Booting ignores engagement and does not provoke reactions.
